query:
-- Stock on hand per feed item (last count + purchases since last count)
SELECT 
  fi.name AS feedItem,
  fi.unit,
  -- Total ration plans (should be 1 per category now)
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ration_plans rp2 WHERE rp2.feedItemId = fi.id AND rp2.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp2.isActive = 1) AS rationPlanCount,
  -- Daily consumption = SUM(qtyPerHeadPerDay * headCount per category)
  ROUND(
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * 
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL)
    ), 0)
    FROM ration_plans rp 
    WHERE rp.feedItemId = fi.id AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
    ), 2
  ) AS dailyConsumptionKg,
  -- Latest stock count
  (SELECT COALESCE(fsl.qty, 0) FROM feed_stock_ledger fsl 
   WHERE fsl.feedItemId = fi.id AND fsl.transactionType = 'stock_count' 
   ORDER BY fsl.transactionDate DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastCountQty
FROM feed_items fi
WHERE fi.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY fi.name;

SELECT 
  fi.name AS feedItem,
  fi.unit,
  -- Total ration plans (should be 1 per category now)
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ration_plans rp2 WHERE rp2.feedItemId = fi.id AND rp2.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp2.isActive = 1) AS rationPlanCount,
  -- Daily consumption = SUM(qtyPerHeadPerDay * headCount per category)
  ROUND(
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(rp.qtyPerHeadPerDay * 
      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL)
    ), 0)
    FROM ration_plans rp 
    WHERE rp.feedItemId = fi.id AND rp.deletedAt IS NULL AND rp.isActive = 1
    ), 2
  ) AS dailyConsumptionKg,
  -- Latest stock count
  (SELECT COALESCE(fsl.qty, 0) FROM feed_stock_ledger fsl 
   WHERE fsl.feedItemId = fi.id AND fsl.transactionType = 'stock_count' 
   ORDER BY fsl.transactionDate DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastCountQty
FROM feed_items fi
WHERE fi.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY fi.name;
